productDisplayName: Carlton London Women Classy Gold Heels
description: The perfect way to complement your ethno-western wear is to slip into these funky sandals from carlton london. The leopard print on the footbed and raised pencil heel make this a fab addition to your wild wardrobe. Heel: 4" Upper Synthetic straps on the forefoot and wrap around ankle straps with a buckle closure Leopard print on the ergonomically curved footbed Outsole Durable rubber outsole with horizontal grooves on the forefoot for absolute grip and traction Pencil heel for style Sandal care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
